DESCRIPTION: I got Broonan's poll numbers up to 24%. The guard should be able to let me into his trailer to meet him.
I have a briefcase with the name "Boddington" on it. An Information Broker at the Book Store might be able to tell me who Boddington is.
BODDINGTONS_BRIEFCASE.QUEST_STEP: I have a briefcase with the name "Boddington" on it. An Information Broker at the Book Store might be able to tell me who Boddington is.

DESCRIPTION: Bree has indicated that some sad fate befell her Original. What was it? Sylvia might know.
BREES_ORIGINAL.QUEST_STEP: Bree has indicated that some sad fate befell her Original. What was it? Sylvia might know.

DESCRIPTION: One of Broonan's field canvassers, Hue-V, was seen on a security monitor. Hue-V will tell me more near Broonan's Campaign RV, by the Circus X grounds.
BROONANS_GAMBIT.QUEST_STEP: One of Broonan's field canvassers, Hue-V, was seen on a security monitor. Hue-V will tell me more near Broonan's Campaign RV, by the Circus X grounds.

DESCRIPTION: The pizzaiolo has given me an opportunity to clean his oven. With his key, I now have access via Gatehouse C, on the Uptown train platform.
If I'm going to hold my own against a Clone, I need to study my opponent from all angles.  And that includes music.  The record collection on-site could provide guidance here.
CLONE_MUSIC.QUEST_STEP: If I'm going to hold my own against a Clone, I need to study my opponent from all angles.  And that includes music.  The record collection on-site could provide guidance here.

DESCRIPTION: Seek to become part of Circus X by making the Perfect Sandwich. -!
I need to Bring Deirdre Klang a sample of my work, such as a pizza.
COOKING_MASTERY.QUEST_STEP: I need to Bring Deirdre Klang a sample of my work, such as a pizza.

DESCRIPTION: Seek to become part of Circus X by becoming the Master of Disguise. -!
I got the Comptroller's Overalls. Now to return to Oakenfold.
DECEPTION_MASTERY.QUEST_STEP: I got the Comptroller's Overalls. Now to return to Oakenfold.

DESCRIPTION: I've been asked to make drinks for the four parties seated in front of the stage. What do they want?-!
Johnny is finally letting me make my own drinks. What will I make?-!
Lancaster got his drinks._!
Zagbar got what he wanted._!
Pasha's been served._!
Bruce got his order._!
I need to get out of this subway station and onto the street, but there's some kind of lockdown going on. I'll learn more in time.
The guards are gone and only Carl Cassia remains.
The slicer was Johnny's while he worked at the deli. Maybe he knows where the power cord is. He's tending bar at Floating Frequencies.
FIXING_THE_SLICER.QUEST_STEP: The slicer was Johnny's while he worked at the deli. Maybe he knows where the power cord is. He's tending bar at Floating Frequencies.

DESCRIPTION: I need to get off this train. The control monitor at the end of the train car should override the locked doors.
The train is fixed. Now let's get those doors open.
Deirdre is concerned about the shortage of ingredients at the Deli. Apparently, it's a "complicated situation."-!
I've harvested the Lettuce from Mount Zan. Time to sell it all to Dzibby.-!
I've harvested the Ruby Tomatoes. Time to sell it all to Dzibby.-!
I've harvested the Arctic Pond Onions. Time to sell it all to Dzibby.-!
I've harvested all the plants Dzibby asked for. Time to cash in.
I found a key to a maintenance closet somewhere in this Deli. What exactly needs maintenance?
MAINTENANCE_KEY_MYSTERY.QUEST_STEP: I found a key to a maintenance closet somewhere in this Deli. What exactly needs maintenance?

DESCRIPTION: Engine Freddie's in a deep discussion with Caetano. I'll need to work my way into the conversation if I'm going to make in-roads with the community here.
I fixed the monitors... but what about what's on them?
Circus X will notice if I'm a member of the house band at Floating Frequencies. Denver encouraged me to talk to all the band members, to see what it would take for them to bring me into their fold.-!

Caetano has encouraged me to go do some busking at The Corner Pocket, a small club tucked away in the tunnel under the train tracks. If I can prove I can earn $100 in a single performance, he'll seriously consider me for the band. -!
My audition will go more favorably if I can get Zewie, the reluctant, taciturn drummer, to back me. -!
Zewie wants me to help connect him with Pasha. She's currently taking mysterious notes near the front of the stage.  -!
I've convinced Lancaster to be a more compliant audience member._!
Pasha thinks she can help Zewie if I can find a book of Caetano's solos from the Old Library.-!
Denver said she'd give Pasha's notebook back if I got Sonny Koln off the barge. That will require helping Sonny sort out the Jade Bass situation.-!
MUSIC_MASTERY.QUEST_NAME: Circus X - Best Band In Town
MUSIC_MASTERY.QUEST_STEP: Denver said she'd give Pasha's notebook back if I got Sonny Koln off the barge. That will require helping Sonny sort out the Jade Bass situation.-!

DESCRIPTION: This key that Tubs gave me opens Denver's safe.  It has something to do with the No-Journalist policy.  But why? -!
What's with the No-Journalist policy? It's Denver's idea, so the truth lies with her. -!
NO_JOURNALIST_POLICY.QUEST_STEP: What's with the No-Journalist policy? It's Denver's idea, so the truth lies with her. -!

DESCRIPTION: I must gain Circus X's trust by proving myself an able documentarian. -!
I need to seek out the documentary filmmaker Calumny Theorbo at the Old Library. He's working on something good.
OBSERVATION_MASTERY.QUEST_STEP: I need to seek out the documentary filmmaker Calumny Theorbo at the Old Library. He's working on something good.

DESCRIPTION: The pigeons on the train platform are a nuisance. Perhaps someone who knows the station well can deal with them.
The ticket agent gave me Pigeon food which could help me deal with the pigeons.

The journalists asked me to go to the Old Book Store and confront Boddington. His briefcase was discovered alongside the stolen Jade Base and they want him to answer for that. They're offering money and access for the intel.
SCOOP_BODDINGTON.QUEST_STEP: The journalists asked me to go to the Old Book Store and confront Boddington. His briefcase was discovered alongside the stolen Jade Base and they want him to answer for that. They're offering money and access for the intel.

DESCRIPTION: The journalists asked me to figure out where exactly the connection lies between Broonan and Circus X. They're offering money and access for the intel.
SCOOP_BROONAN.QUEST_STEP: The journalists asked me to figure out where exactly the connection lies between Broonan and Circus X. They're offering money and access for the intel.

DESCRIPTION: The journalists asked me to infiltrate Floating Fequencies and report on Sonny Koln's current state of mind. They're offering money and access for the intel.
SCOOP_SONNY.QUEST_STEP: The journalists asked me to infiltrate Floating Fequencies and report on Sonny Koln's current state of mind. They're offering money and access for the intel.

DESCRIPTION: There's a petition going around trying to get Clones to vote. It could seriously alter the outcome of the election and momentum is rising for this to become a reality. Broonan's campaign manager Moomin is involved in the process. Let's see what she has to say about it.
THE_CLONE_VOTE.QUEST_STEP: There's a petition going around trying to get Clones to vote. It could seriously alter the outcome of the election and momentum is rising for this to become a reality. Broonan's campaign manager Moomin is involved in the process. Let's see what she has to say about it.

DESCRIPTION: The Jade Bass Emotional Support Unit, which serves a crucial role in the city's current Mayoral Election, has been hacked by the Diamond Hand. I should bring to the Human Resource Horizons Factory to get it reset. Potential friends in high places are watching to see what I do next.-!
Getting access to the factory requires setting up an appointment with Pyotr, the Jade Bass's creator. He is currently taking his lunch break at Klang's Deli, up the street from the Factory. -!
THE_JADE_BASS.QUEST_STEP: Getting access to the factory requires setting up an appointment with Pyotr, the Jade Bass's creator. He is currently taking his lunch break at Klang's Deli, up the street from the Factory. -!

DESCRIPTION: Carl Cassia has entrusted me with some film. Deliver it to the Koln Campaign HQ and I will be rewarded.
THE_ROLL_OF_FILM.QUEST_STEP: Carl Cassia has entrusted me with some film. Deliver it to the Koln Campaign HQ and I will be rewarded.

DESCRIPTION: The trophies in Klang's awards rack raise questions.  Perhaps the House Manager, Dzibby, can answer them.
TROPHY_STORY.QUEST_STEP: The trophies in Klang's awards rack raise questions.  Perhaps the House Manager, Dzibby, can answer them.

DESCRIPTION: The guards won't let me into the VIP Box unless I bribe them. One guard requires cash. -!
The guards won't let me into the VIP Box unless I bribe them. One guard requires a bootleg of tonight's show, courtesy of Bruce G. -!
Bruce G will give me a bootleg of the show if I can help fix his microphone placement up on the mezzanine, where there was considerable damage to the barge.

Gustav won't let me into the damaged area of the barge. He needs a Full Body Power Vacuum from the Janitor Closet. He'll let me have at it if I can get to the Janitor's Closet, in the center of the barge.
I can now approach Sonny Koln at the VIP area of the Jazz Barge.
Winning part in the Circus X City Council Debate will get me in the door at Circus X. -!
Algo wants me to bring Jo Troy's approval rating up to 30% through public debating on the stump.
WISDOM_MASTERY.QUEST_STEP: Algo wants me to bring Jo Troy's approval rating up to 30% through public debating on the stump.
